'''folaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hueful|hueful]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hueful|hueful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| folaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:folarithi|folarithi]] || [[word:folariji|folariji]] || [[word:folarishi|folarishi]] || [[word:folariki|folariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:folaruthuthu|folaruthuthu]] || [[word:folarujuju|folarujuju]] || [[word:folarushushu|folarushushu]] || [[word:folarukuku|folarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:folaruthu|folaruthu]] || [[word:folaruju|folaruju]] || [[word:folarushu|folarushu]] || [[word:folaruku|folaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:folarufthuf|folarufthuf]] || [[word:folarufjuf|folarufjuf]] || [[word:folarufshuf|folarufshuf]] || [[word:folarufkuf|folarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:folarethe|folarethe]] || [[word:folareje|folareje]] || [[word:folareshe|folareshe]] || [[word:folareke|folareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:folarothotho|folarothotho]] || [[word:folarojojo|folarojojo]] || [[word:folaroshosho|folaroshosho]] || [[word:folarokoko|folarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:folarotho|folarotho]] || [[word:folarojo|folarojo]] || [[word:folarosho|folarosho]] || [[word:folaroko|folaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:folarofthof|folarofthof]] || [[word:folarofjof|folarofjof]] || [[word:folarofshof|folarofshof]] || [[word:folarofkof|folarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:folarÃŸfthÃŸf|folarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfjÃŸf|folarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfshÃŸf|folarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfkÃŸf|folarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:folarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|folarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|folarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|folarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|folarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:folarÃŸfthÃŸf|folarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfjÃŸf|folarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfshÃŸf|folarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfkÃŸf|folarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:folarÃŸfthÃŸf|folarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfjÃŸf|folarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfshÃŸf|folarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folarÃŸfkÃŸf|folarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:folarÃḊthÃḊ|folarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:folarÃḊjÃḊ|folarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:folarÃḊshÃḊ|folarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:folarÃḊkÃḊ|folarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:folarathatha|folarathatha]] || [[word:folarajaja|folarajaja]] || [[word:folarashasha|folarashasha]] || [[word:folarakaka|folarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:folaratha|folaratha]] || [[word:folaraja|folaraja]] || [[word:folarasha|folarasha]] || [[word:folaraka|folaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:folarafthaf|folarafthaf]] || [[word:folarafjaf|folarafjaf]] || [[word:folarafshaf|folarafshaf]] || [[word:folarafkaf|folarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:folarasha|folarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:folarshÃḋsha|folarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folarosha|folarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folarmusha|folarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:folaryasha|folaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolarnkshÃḋsha|gofolarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolarnkrosha|gofolarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolarnkmusha|gofolarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolarnkyasha|gofolarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:folalarasha|folalarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:folalarshÃḋsha|folalarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folalarosha|folalarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folalarmusha|folalarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:folalaryasha|folalaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolalarnkshÃḋsha|gofolalarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolalarnkrosha|gofolalarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolalarnkmusha|gofolalarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolalarnkyasha|gofolalarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:felÃḊrasha|felÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:felÃḊrshÃḋsha|felÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:felÃḊrosha|felÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:felÃḊrmusha|felÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:felÃḊryasha|felÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofelÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gofelÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofelÃḊrnkrosha|gofelÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofelÃḊrnkmusha|gofelÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofelÃḊrnkyasha|gofelÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:folfarasha|folfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:folfarshÃḋsha|folfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folfarosha|folfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folfarmusha|folfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:folfaryasha|folfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolfarnkshÃḋsha|gofolfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolfarnkrosha|gofolfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolfarnkmusha|gofolfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolfarnkyasha|gofolfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
